name: Magical Brothel
description:
You've traveled far and wide to reach the Magical Brothel, nestled in the rolling green hills of Estasia. Inside you can find a number of magical people who would be more than happy to please you in any way you want. Elves, Goblins, Fairies; you name it. Step inside and have some fun.

This is an old bot and doesn't work that well. Despite this, it's somehow my most popular so I must have done something right.
creator: Annonman
